# Top Heading

The first paragraph under the top heading exists to prove that truncation
without frontmatter starts at the first heading, not at line zero.

Filler paragraph that should be dropped because a blank line terminates the
first-paragraph run above. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing
elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

More filler to pad the file above the 8 KiB threshold. Ut enim ad minim veniam,
quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo
consequat. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse
cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur.

No-frontmatter filler padding line one — long sentence to grow the byte size
of the fixture file above the threshold without contributing anything useful.
No-frontmatter filler padding line two with the same shape and purpose — pad.
No-frontmatter filler padding line three with the same shape and purpose — pad.
No-frontmatter filler padding line four with the same shape and purpose — pad.
No-frontmatter filler padding line five with the same shape and purpose — pad.
No-frontmatter filler padding line six with the same shape and purpose — pad.
No-frontmatter filler padding line seven with the same shape and purpose — pad.
No-frontmatter filler padding line eight with the same shape and purpose — pad.
No-frontmatter filler padding line nine with the same shape and purpose — pad.
No-frontmatter filler padding line ten with the same shape and purpose — pad.

## Second Heading

The first paragraph under the second heading also survives the truncator. It
proves that multiple sections each keep their first paragraph.

Second-heading filler paragraph to be dropped. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet,
consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et
dolore magna aliqua.
